title: From Genetic Variant to Wet-lab: Accelerating the path from hypothesis to experiment
summary: Google Antigravity's Science Skills is an agentic workbench that integrates frontier models with access to over 30 scientific databases like UniProt, PubChem, and ChEMBL. It enables researchers to move from genetic observation to experimental design in minutes by orchestrating models, literature, and data into multi-step workflows.
